results.title: 'Do we need Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma?': R Ashwin breaks silence on India's 2027 World Cup plans
results.description: Ravichandran Ashwin questions the timing of speculation about Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli's ODI futures. He believes selectors should have communicated any transition plans much earlier. Ashwin stated that the experienced duo's presence is still needed for upcoming tours. Honest communication is essential when managing senior players' careers. Such discussions are surfacing late, with the next World Cup approaching.
